name: acryl-datahub-airflow-plugin

metadata.name: acryl-datahub-airflow-plugin
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Datahub Airflow plugin to capture executions and send to Datahub

documentation:
# Datahub Airflow Plugin

See [the DataHub Airflow docs](https://datahubproject.io/docs/lineage/airflow) for details.

## Developing

See the [developing docs](../../metadata-ingestion/developing.md).

classes.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.operators.datahub.DatahubBaseOperator

methods.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.operators.datahub.DatahubBaseOperator.__init__
documentation: mypy is not a fan of this. Newer versions of Airflow support proper typing for the decorator
using PEP 612. However, there is not yet a good way to inherit the types of the kwargs from
the superclass.
The DatahubBaseOperator is used as a base operator all DataHub operators.

Emits a Metadata Change Event to DataHub using either a DataHub
Rest or Kafka connection.

```
Reference to the DataHub Rest or Kafka Connection.

str
```

classes.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.operators.datahub_operation_sensor.DataHubOperationCircuitBreakerSensor
documentation:
DataHub Operation Circuit Breaker Sensor.

```
param urn

The DataHub dataset unique identifier. (templated)

param datahub_rest_conn_id

The REST datahub connection id to communicate with DataHub
which is set as Airflow connection.

param partition

The partition to check the operation.

param source_type

The source type to filter on. If not set it will accept any source type.
See valid values at: https://datahubproject.io/docs/graphql/enums#operationsourcetype

param operation_type

The operation type to filter on. If not set it will accept any source type.
See valid values at: https://datahubproject.io/docs/graphql/enums/#operationtype
```

classes.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.operators.datahub_assertion_operator.DataHubAssertionOperator
documentation:
DataHub Assertion Circuit Breaker Operator.

```
param urn

The DataHub dataset unique identifier. (templated)

param datahub_rest_conn_id

The REST datahub connection id to communicate with DataHub
which is set as Airflow connection.

param check_last_assertion_time

If set it checks assertions after the last operation was set on the dataset.
By default it is True.

param time_delta

If verify_after_last_update is False it checks for assertion within the time delta.
```

functions.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.lineage.datahub.get_lineage_backend_config
documentation: Load the lineage config from airflow.cfg.

classes.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.lineage.datahub.DatahubLineageBackend

methods.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.lineage.datahub.DatahubLineageBackend.send_lineage
documentation: With Airflow 2.0, this can be an instance method. However, with Airflow 1.10.x, this
method is used statically, even though LineageBackend declares it as an instance variable.

Sends lineage data from tasks to DataHub.

Configurable via `airflow.cfg` as follows:

```
# For REST-based:
airflow connections add  --conn-type 'datahub_rest' 'datahub_rest_default' --conn-host 'http://localhost:8080'
# For Kafka-based (standard Kafka sink config can be passed via extras):
airflow connections add  --conn-type 'datahub_kafka' 'datahub_kafka_default' --conn-host 'broker:9092' --conn-extra '{}'

[lineage]
backend = datahub_provider.lineage.datahub.DatahubLineageBackend
datahub_kwargs = {
    "datahub_conn_id": "datahub_rest_default",
    "capture_ownership_info": true,
    "capture_tags_info": true }
# The above indentation is important!
```

functions.name: datahub_airflow_plugin._config.get_lineage_config
documentation: Load the DataHub plugin config from airflow.cfg.

functions.name: datahub_airflow_plugin._datahub_listener_module.on_task_instance_running
documentation: The run_in_thread decorator messes with pluggy's interface discovery,
which causes the hooks to be called with no arguments and results in TypeErrors.
This is only an issue with Pluggy <= 1.0.0.
See https://github.com/pytest-dev/pluggy/issues/358
Note that pluggy 1.0.0 is in the constraints file for Airflow 2.4 and 2.5.

modules.name: datahub_airflow_plugin._airflow_compat
documentation: This module must be imported before any Airflow imports in any of our files.
The AIRFLOW_PATCHED just helps avoid flake8 errors.

modules.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.example_dags.mysql_sample_dag
documentation:
MySQL DataHub Ingest DAG

This example demonstrates how to ingest metadata from MySQL into DataHub
from within an Airflow DAG. Note that the DB connection configuration is
embedded within the code.

modules.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.example_dags.lineage_emission_dag
documentation:
Lineage Emission

This example demonstrates how to emit lineage to DataHub within an Airflow DAG.

modules.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.example_dags.generic_recipe_sample_dag
documentation:
Generic DataHub Ingest via Recipe

This example demonstrates how to load any configuration file and run a
DataHub ingestion pipeline within an Airflow DAG.

modules.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.example_dags.snowflake_sample_dag
documentation:
Snowflake DataHub Ingest DAG

This example demonstrates how to ingest metadata from Snowflake into DataHub
from within an Airflow DAG. In contrast to the MySQL example, this DAG
pulls the DB connection configuration from Airflow's connection store.

modules.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.example_dags.lineage_backend_taskflow_demo
documentation:
Lineage Backend

An example DAG demonstrating the usage of DataHub's Airflow lineage backend using the TaskFlow API.

modules.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.example_dags.lineage_backend_demo
documentation:
Lineage Backend

An example DAG demonstrating the usage of DataHub's Airflow lineage backend.

methods.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.client.airflow_generator.AirflowGenerator.generate_datajob
documentation:
---
param capture_owner: bool - whether to extract owner from airflow task
param capture_tags: bool - whether to set tags automatically from airflow task
param cluster: str
param config: DatahubLineageConfig
param dag: DAG
param set_dependencies: bool - whether to extract dependencies from airflow task
param task: TaskIntance
return: DataJob - returns the generated DataJob object
---

methods.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.client.airflow_generator.AirflowGenerator.complete_dataflow
documentation:
---
param cluster: str - name of the cluster
param dag_run: DagRun
param dataflow: Optional\[Dataflow\]
param emitter: Emitter - the datahub emitter to emit the generated mcps
param end_timestamp_millis: Optional\[int\] - the completion time in milliseconds
  if not set the current time will be used.
---

methods.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.client.airflow_generator.AirflowGenerator.complete_datajob
documentation:
---
param cluster: str
param config: Optional\[DatahubLineageConfig\]
param dag: DAG
param dag_run: DagRun
param datajob: Optional\[DataJob\]
param emitter: Emitter - the datahub emitter to emit the generated mcps
param end_timestamp_millis: Optional\[int\]
param result: Optional\[str\] One of the result from datahub.metadata.schema_class.RunResultTypeClass
param ti: TaskInstance
return: DataProcessInstance
---

classes.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.hooks.datahub.DatahubRestHook

methods.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.hooks.datahub.DatahubRestHook.get_ui_field_behaviour
documentation: Returns custom field behavior

Creates a DataHub Rest API connection used to send metadata to DataHub.
Takes the endpoint for your DataHub Rest API in the Server Endpoint(host) field.

URI example:

```
AIRFLOW_CONN_DATAHUB_REST_DEFAULT='datahub-rest://rest-endpoint'
```

```
param datahub_rest_conn_id

Reference to the DataHub Rest connection.

type datahub_rest_conn_id

str
```

classes.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.hooks.datahub.DatahubKafkaHook

methods.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.hooks.datahub.DatahubKafkaHook.get_ui_field_behaviour
documentation: Returns custom field behavior

Creates a DataHub Kafka connection used to send metadata to DataHub.
Takes your kafka broker in the Kafka Broker(host) field.

URI example:

```
AIRFLOW_CONN_DATAHUB_KAFKA_DEFAULT='datahub-kafka://kafka-broker'
```

```
param datahub_kafka_conn_id

Reference to the DataHub Kafka connection.

type datahub_kafka_conn_id

str
```

classes.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.hooks.datahub.DatahubGenericHook
documentation:
Emits Metadata Change Events using either the DatahubRestHook or the

```

Reference to the DataHub connection.

type datahub_conn_id

str
```

functions.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.datahub_listener.hookimpl
documentation: To placate mypy on Airflow versions that don't have the listener API,
we define a dummy hookimpl that's an identity function.

methods.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.datahub_listener.DataHubListener._set_log_level
documentation:
Set the log level for the plugin and its dependencies.

This may need to be called multiple times, since Airflow sometimes
messes with the logging configuration after the plugin is loaded.
In particular, the loggers may get changed when the worker starts
executing a task.

methods.name: datahub_airflow_plugin.datahub_listener.DataHubListener._extract_lineage
documentation:
Combine lineage (including column lineage) from task inlets/outlets and
extractor-generated task_metadata and write it to the datajob. This
routine is also responsible for converting the lineage to DataHub URNs.
